description_long: This is a classical-style marble sculpture depicting a draped, headless human figure in flowing garments. The figure's pose suggests movement, with one arm raised and the fabric of the robe billowing outward, creating a sense of dynamic motion. The intricate folds and creases of the clothing are finely detailed, emphasizing the craftsmanship and realism of the piece. The sculpture is missing its head and both feet, which is typical of many ancient statues that have survived through time. The surface shows a smooth, slightly weathered patina, with subtle variations in color from white to light beige. The overall form is elegant and expressive, capturing the grace and fluidity of the human body in motion.
description: A headless marble sculpture of a draped human figure in motion, with detailed flowing garments and a smooth, weathered surface.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the dynamic sweep of the robe and the raised arm, with detailed folds in the fabric.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the torso, waist, and the naturalistic drapery of the garment.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the broad, flowing back of the robe and the dramatic outward extension of the fabric.
description_view_3: Back-right view showing the curvature of the back and the way the garment wraps around the figure's side.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
